variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DVD20015B50B/5. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DVD20015B50B/5 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Outer Diameter: 60.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 34.2 mm, Length: 175.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
